title.en: China-to-Tajikistan Solar PV Inverter Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器进入塔吉克斯坦：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器進入塔吉克斯坦：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China solar PV inverter documentation against Tajikistan Tajikstandart conformity requirements, Barqi Tojik grid-connection and project specifications, IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence, IEC 62116 anti-islanding, IEC 61000-series EMC, 50 Hz 220/380 V grid settings, high-altitude and cold-climate derating factors, and donor/lender (World Bank / ADB) technical specifications — versus China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines. Note: Tajikistan is NOT an EAEU member; EAC/TR CU marking does not constitute conformity for Tajikistan. The domestic route is Tajikstandart conformity certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国太阳能光伏逆变器文件与塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart合格评定要求、Barqi Tojik并网及项目规格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据、IEC 62116防孤岛、IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V电网参数、高海拔和寒冷气候降额因素，以及援助方/贷款方（世界银行/亚开行）技术规格——对比中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准的差距对照。注意：塔吉克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，EAC/TR CU标志不构成塔吉克斯坦的合格依据。国内合规路径为Tajikstandart合格评定认证。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國太陽能光伏逆變器文件與塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart合格評定要求、Barqi Tojik併網及項目規格、IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據、IEC 62116防孤島、IEC 61000系列EMC、50 Hz 220/380 V電網參數、高海拔和寒冷氣候降額因素，以及援助方/貸款方（世界銀行/亞開行）技術規格——對比中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準的差距對照。注意：塔吉克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，EAC/TR CU標誌不構成塔吉克斯坦的合格依據。國內合規路徑為Tajikstandart合格評定認證。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, Tajikstandart conformity scope determination, Barqi Tojik grid-connection approval, donor/lender equipment eligibility decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Tajikstan Tajikstandart technical regulations, Barqi Tojik grid-connection technical specifications, applicable IEC standards adoption status, Ministry of Energy and Water Resources requirements, and project-owner or donor/lender requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、Tajikstandart合格评定范围裁定、Barqi Tojik并网批准、援助方/贷款方设备资格决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart技术法规、Barqi Tojik并网技术规格、适用IEC标准采纳状态、能源和水资源部要求及项目业主或援助方/贷款方要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、Tajikstandart合格評定範圍裁定、Barqi Tojik併網批准、援助方/貸款方設備資格決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行塔吉克斯坦Tajikstandart技術法規、Barqi Tojik併網技術規格、適用IEC標準採納狀態、能源和水資源部要求及項目業主或援助方/貸款方要求。

answer_first.en: For solar PV inverters exported from China to Tajikistan, the key practical gaps are: (1) Tajikstandart conformity certification is the mandatory domestic route — Tajikistan is NOT an EAEU member, so EAC/TR CU marking does not by itself satisfy Tajikstandart requirements; (2) IEC 62109-1/-2 safety type-test evidence is required by Barqi Tojik grid-connection and donor/lender (World Bank, ADB) project specifications; (3) IEC 62116 anti-islanding compliance for the 50 Hz grid; (4) IEC 61000-series EMC evidence; (5) high-altitude derating documentation for Tajikistan's mountainous terrain (many sites above 1,000–2,000 m), including thermal and output power derating per IEC 62109-1 and manufacturer specifications; and (6) cold-climate operating range validation (winter temperatures can fall below −20 °C at altitude). China GB/T 37408 and GB/T 19964 baselines do not satisfy Tajikstandart conformity or Barqi Tojik/donor-lender grid-connection requirements and cannot be substituted without supplementary IEC test evidence.
answer_first.zh: 中国太阳能光伏逆变器出口塔吉克斯坦时，主要实际差距包括：（1）Tajikstandart合格评定认证是强制性国内合规路径——塔吉克斯坦非欧亚经济联盟（EAEU）成员，EAC/TR CU标志本身不满足Tajikstandart要求；（2）Barqi Tojik并网及援助方/贷款方（世界银行、亚开行）项目规格要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式试验证据；（3）50 Hz电网的IEC 62116防孤岛合规；（4）IEC 61000系列EMC证据；（5）塔吉克斯坦山地高海拔场地（许多地点海拔超过1,000–2,000 m）的高海拔降额文件，包括依据IEC 62109-1及制造商规格的热降额和输出功率降额；（6）低温运行范围验证（高海拔冬季气温可低于−20 °C）。中国GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基准不满足Tajikstandart合格评定或Barqi Tojik/援助方-贷款方并网要求，在没有补充IEC测试证据的情况下不可替代。
answer_first.zht: 中國太陽能光伏逆變器出口塔吉克斯坦時，主要實際差距包括：（1）Tajikstandart合格評定認證是強制性國內合規路徑——塔吉克斯坦非歐亞經濟聯盟（EAEU）成員，EAC/TR CU標誌本身不滿足Tajikstandart要求；（2）Barqi Tojik併網及援助方/貸款方（世界銀行、亞開行）項目規格要求IEC 62109-1/-2安全型式試驗證據；（3）50 Hz電網的IEC 62116防孤島合規；（4）IEC 61000系列EMC證據；（5）塔吉克斯坦山地高海拔場地（許多地點海拔超過1,000–2,000 m）的高海拔降額文件，包括依據IEC 62109-1及製造商規格的熱降額和輸出功率降額；（6）低溫運行範圍驗證（高海拔冬季氣溫可低於−20 °C）。中國GB/T 37408和GB/T 19964基準不滿足Tajikstandart合格評定或Barqi Tojik/援助方-貸款方併網要求，在沒有補充IEC測試證據的情況下不可替代。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
